title: Chewy Earthy Chinese Leaf Stir-fry
description: A monsoon Venezuelan dish featuring chewy and earthy Chinese leaf, reduced in a high-protein-friendly sauce with added vegetables for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Prepare the tofu by pressing it with paper towels to remove excess water. Pat dry.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chopped onions and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic, chives, red bell pepper, and Chinese leaf. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until the vegetables are slightly softened.
Pour soy sauce and water into the pan. Reduce the mixture by half while stirring continuously to avoid burning. Cook for 1 minute more.
Toss in cubed tofu and continue to stir-fry until all ingredients are heated through and evenly coated with the sauce, about 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot as a main dish or side dish.
